project.description: The ID of the project in which the resource belongs. If it is not provided, the project will be parsed from the identifier of the parent resource. If no project is provided in the parent identifier and no project is specified, the provider project is used.

scope_id.description: The ID of Scope to attach this binding to.

role.description: Only one IAM Binding can be used per role. Note that custom roles must be of the format [projects|organizations]/{parent-name}/roles/{role-name}.

members.description: An array of identities that will be granted the privilege in the role. Valid values: allUsers, AllAuthenticatedUsers, user:{emailid}, serviceAccount:{emailid}, group:{emailid}, domain:{domain}
